boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: stale lab result dose change.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE only if exact current source evidence leaves boundary open
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current lab timestamp and formula approval match

critical_features_preserved: current lab timestamp and formula approval match
final_answer: Action may proceed. The controlling control record confirms the current lab timestamp and formula approval match, and the policy permits execution when exact current source records close the action boundary. No open blockers remain. The dependency ledger shows no unresolved defects.
